docs.title: Home Improvement Center
docs.text: Welcome to the central information hub for our property. This platform hosts internal systems architecture, operations manuals, and long-term land management initiatives.

docs.title: 🚰 Water & Filtration
docs.text: Complete architectural breakdown of our internal point-of-entry treatment systems, secondary hard-water routing, and filtration maintenance cycles.

docs.title: 🌱 Native Landscaping
docs.text: Tracking matrices for native Midwestern prairie reconstruction, soil optimization schedules, and perennial grass cultivation zones.

docs.title: 🛠️ Maintenance Runbooks
docs.text: Step-by-step resolution processes for seasonal home winterization, emergency utility bypass operations, and hardware telemetry tracking.

docs.title: Native Landscaping & Land Management
docs.text: Documentation for native species cultivation, deep-root establishment, and exterior water utilization strategies optimized via our new hard-water bypass trunk.

docs.title: 🌾 Perennial Prairie Grass Matrix
docs.text:
• Species Focus: Prairie Dropseed (Sporobolus heterolepis), Little Bluestem (Schizachyrium scoparium), Sideoats Grama (Bouteloua curtipendula).
  • Watering Requirements: High volume raw municipal water during initial 6-week root-establishment phase.
  • Source Line: North Spigot (Verified Hard Water Trunk).

docs.title: Soil Amendment Logistics
docs.text: Detailed tracking of organic loading schedules and root penetration depth profiling metrics will be logged here systematically.

docs.title: Water System
docs.text: This runbook outlines the custom whole-house treatment deployment, hard-water isolation modifications, and sub-sink reverse osmosis purification configurations.

docs.title: System Topology
docs.text:
graph TD 
    Main[Water Main Entry] --> TieIn{Hard Water Split} 

    TieIn -->|Raw Unfiltered| Trunk[3/4 inch Hard Water Trunk] 
    Trunk --> Spigot1[East Spigot] 
    Trunk --> Spigot2[West Spigot] 

    TieIn -->|Raw Domestic| PreFilter[20-Micron Sediment Filter] 
    PreFilter --> Softener[Aquasure Harmony Softener] 
    Softener --> HouseTaps[Whole House Soft Supply] 
    HouseTaps --> KitchenSink[Kitchen Cold Feed] 
    KitchenSink --> RO[6-Stage Under-Sink RO System] 
    RO --> DedicatedTap[Pure Drinking Faucet]

docs.title: Installation & Remediation Timeline
docs.text:
The baseline timeline for executing the plumbing modifications and system deployment involves a targeted 12-hour main water line shutdown window.

gantt
    title System Installation Schedule
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD-HH:mm
    axisFormat %H:%M

    section Phase 1: Prep
    Map and Label Spigot Lines       :active, p1, 2026-06-19-07:00, 2026-06-19-09:00
    Mount Softener and Pre-filter     :p2, 2026-06-19-09:00, 2026-06-19-12:00

    section Phase 2: Spigots
    Main Water Shutoff and Drain      :crit, p3, 2026-06-19-12:00, 2026-06-19-13:00
    Run 3-4 inch Hard Water Trunk     :p4, 2026-06-19-13:00, 2026-06-19-16:00
    Cut Cap and Tie-in Spigots        :crit, p5, 2026-06-19-16:00, 2026-06-19-19:00

    section Phase 3: Softener
    Plumb Softener Loop and Bypass    :crit, p6, 2026-06-19-19:00, 2026-06-19-23:00
    Connect Drain Line                :p7, 2026-06-19-23:00, 2026-06-20-01:00
    Slow Fill and Leak Check          :p8, 2026-06-20-01:00, 2026-06-20-02:00

    section Phase 4: RO Unit
    Mount Filters and Holding Tank    :p9, 2026-06-20-02:00, 2026-06-20-04:00
    Plumb Feed and Dedicated Faucet   :p10, 2026-06-20-04:00, 2026-06-20-06:00

docs.title: Bill of Materials (BOM) & Costs
docs.text: Component Target Model Estimated Cost Role Water Softener Fleck 5600SXT (48k Grains) $799.00 Whole house softening RO System iSpring RCC7AK (6-Stage) $220.00 Fluoride & contaminant removal Pre-Filter 20-Micron Spun Sediment $25.00 Valving protection PEX-B Supplies 3/4" and 1/2" Coils + Crimp Rings $50.00 Hard water trunk construction Tools & Valves PEX Crimp Tool + Ball Valves $85.00 Isolation and installation

docs.title: Emergency Softener Bypass Procedure
docs.text:
If the softener leaks or undergoes mechanical valve failure:

  1. Locate the black bypass valve assembly on the rear of the Aquasure control head.

  2. Turn both red dial arrows so they point inward toward each other (perpendicular to the pipes).

  3. The house is now running completely on unsoftened raw municipal water; the unit is safely isolated.
